html:
2026-0302
2026-03-30FINCustoms TariffUnited States Surtax Remission Order (Motor Vehicles 2026)United States Surtax Remission Order (Motor Vehicles 2026) in order to renew the automotive remission framework for one year, allowing eligible automakers to import a set number of vehicles free of Canada’s counter-tariffs, provided they maintain production and investment in Canada.N/A
subject: United States Surtax Remission Order (Motor Vehicles 2026)
precis: United States Surtax Remission Order (Motor Vehicles 2026) in order to renew the automotive remission framework for one year, allowing eligible automakers to import a set number of vehicles free of Canada’s counter-tariffs, provided they maintain production and investment in Canada.
